mapper.sql: id, content_id, platform, platform_content_id, platform_url, status, retry_count, max_retry_count, error_msg, publish_time, complete_time, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM content_publish_record WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM content_publish_record WHERE content_id = #{contentId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM content_publish_record WHERE content_id = #{contentId} AND platform = #{platform} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO content_publish_record ( content_id, platform, platform_content_id, platform_url, status, retry_count, max_retry_count, error_msg, publish_time, complete_time, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{contentId}, #{platform}, #{platformContentId}, #{platformUrl}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{maxRetryCount}, #{errorMsg}, #{publishTime}, #{completeTime}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.delete: UPDATE content_publish_record SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE content_publish_record SET status = #{status}, complete_time = NOW(), error_msg = #{errorMsg}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE content_publish_record SET retry_count = retry_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM content_publish_record WHERE status = 0 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT FROM content_publish_record WHERE status = 3 AND retry_count < max_retry_count AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM content_publish_record WHERE content_id = #{contentId} AND status = #{status} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO content_publish_record ( content_id, platform, platform_content_id, platform_url, status, retry_count, max_retry_count, error_msg, publish_time, complete_time, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES
( #{item.contentId}, #{item.platform}, #{item.platformContentId}, #{item.platformUrl}, #{item.status}, #{item.retryCount}, #{item.maxRetryCount}, #{item.errorMsg}, #{item.publishTime}, #{item.completeTime}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
